---
title: "AQI Analysis"
format: html
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
import time
import warnings
import numpy as np
import os
```
```{python}
aqi_all = pd.read_csv('AQI_data/aqi_all.csv')

aqi_all.head()
aqi_all['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(aqi_all['Date'])
```

```{python}
#plotting aqi over time 

aqi_all["YearMonth"] = aqi_all["Date"].dt.to_period("M").astype(str)

monthly_avg = (
    aqi_all
    .groupby("YearMonth")["AQI"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)

illinois_aqi = alt.Chart(monthly_avg).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "YearMonth:T",
        title="Year",
        axis=alt.Axis(
            format="%Y",
            tickCount="year",
            labelAngle=0
        )
    ),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", "AQI:Q"]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI (2018–2025)"
)

```

```{python}
#plotting aqi for cook county over time

cook = aqi_all[aqi_all['county Name'] == 'Cook'] 



cook["YearMonth"] = cook["Date"].dt.to_period("M").astype(str)

monthly_avg_cook = (
    cook
    .groupby("YearMonth")["AQI"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)

monthly_avg_cook.describe()
monthly_avg.describe()

cook_aqi = alt.Chart(monthly_avg_cook).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "YearMonth:T",
        title="Year",
        axis=alt.Axis(
            format="%Y",
            tickCount="year",
            labelAngle=0
        )
    ),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", "AQI:Q"]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI in Cook County (2018–2025)"
)


```

```{python}
cook_aqi & illinois_aqi
```

```{python}

# --- Illinois monthly avg ---
aqi_all["YearMonth"] = aqi_all["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

illinois_monthly = (
    aqi_all
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)
illinois_monthly["Place"] = "Illinois"

# --- Cook monthly avg ---
cook = aqi_all[aqi_all["county Name"] == "Cook"].copy()
cook["YearMonth"] = cook["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

cook_monthly = (
    cook
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)
cook_monthly["Place"] = "Cook County"

# --- Combine ---
combined = pd.concat([illinois_monthly, cook_monthly], ignore_index=True)

# --- One chart ---
aqi_both = alt.Chart(combined).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X("YearMonth:T", title="Year",
            axis=alt.Axis(format="%Y", tickCount="year", labelAngle=0)),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    color=alt.Color("Place:N", title=""),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("YearMonth:T", title="Month"),
        alt.Tooltip("Place:N"),
        alt.Tooltip("AQI:Q", format=".1f")
    ]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI: Illinois vs Cook County (2018–2025)"
)

aqi_both
```


```{python}
#creating a mark_rect() heatmap to show AQI

cook_daily = (
    aqi_all.loc[aqi_all["county Name"] == "Cook", ["Date", "AQI"]]
    .dropna()
    .assign(date=lambda d: d["Date"].dt.floor("D"))
    .groupby("date", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)

cook_daily["year"]  = cook_daily["date"].dt.year
cook_daily["month"] = cook_daily["date"].dt.month
cook_daily["day"]   = cook_daily["date"].dt.day

month_order = ["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"]
month_map = {i+1: m for i, m in enumerate(month_order)}
cook_daily["month_name"] = cook_daily["month"].map(month_map)

# ---- Build full calendar grid ----
years = sorted(cook_daily["year"].unique())

grid = (
    pd.MultiIndex.from_product(
        [years, range(1, 13), range(1, 32)],
        names=["year", "month", "day"]
    )
    .to_frame(index=False)
)

grid["month_name"] = grid["month"].map(month_map)
grid["date"] = pd.to_datetime(grid[["year","month","day"]], errors="coerce")

cal = grid.merge(
    cook_daily[["year","month","day","AQI"]],
    on=["year","month","day"],
    how="left"
)

aqi_min = cook_daily["AQI"].min()
aqi_max = cook_daily["AQI"].max()

year_dropdown = alt.binding_select(options=years, name="Year: ")
year_sel = alt.selection_point(fields=["year"], bind=year_dropdown, value=years[0])

calendar_heatmap = alt.Chart(cal).mark_rect().encode(
    x=alt.X("day:O", title="Day"),
    y=alt.Y("month_name:O", sort=month_order, title="Month"),
    color=alt.condition(
        "isValid(datum.AQI)",
        alt.Color(
            "AQI:Q",
            scale=alt.Scale(
                domain=[aqi_min, aqi_max],
                scheme="blues"
            ),
            title="AQI"
        ),
        alt.value("white")
    ),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("date:T", title="Date"),
        alt.Tooltip("AQI:Q", format=".1f")
    ]
).add_params(
    year_sel
).transform_filter(
    year_sel
).properties(
    width=900,
    height=320,
    title="Cook County Daily AQI Calendar Heatmap (2018–2025)"
)

calendar_heatmap
```


```{python}
#reading in temperature data 
temp = pd.read_csv('AQI_data/temperature.csv')
```

```{python}
temp.head()

#subsetting to cook county 
temp_cook = temp[temp['NAME'] == 'CHICAGO MIDWAY AIRPORT 3 SW, IL US']

temp_cook = temp_cook[["DATE", "tavg_calc", "NAME"]].dropna()

temp_cook = temp_cook.rename(columns={
    "DATE": "date",
    "tavg_calc": "temp"
})

temp_cook["date"] = pd.to_datetime(temp_cook["date"])

temp_cook.head()
```

```{python}
#merging aqi and temp data

cook_daily_temp = cook_daily.merge(
    temp_cook[["date", "temp"]],
    on="date",
    how="inner"
)

cook_daily_temp.head()
cook_daily_temp.describe()

```

```{python}
#scatter plot of temp vs aqi 

scatter = alt.Chart(cook_daily_temp).mark_circle(opacity=0.3).encode(
    x=alt.X("temp:Q", title="Temperature (°F)"),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="AQI"),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("date:T"),
        alt.Tooltip("temp:Q", format=".1f"),
        alt.Tooltip("AQI:Q", format=".1f")
    ]
).properties(
    width=600,
    height=400,
    title="Cook County: Daily AQI vs Temperature"
)

scatter + scatter.transform_regression(
    "temp", "AQI"
).mark_line(color="blue")


```

```{python}
#importing virus data for city of chicago
virus = pd.read_csv('AQI_data/virus.csv')
virus['week_start'] = pd.to_datetime(virus['week_start'])

#creating year and month columns for virus data

virus['YearMonth'] = virus['week_start'].dt.to_period('M').dt.to_timestamp()
```

```{python}
virus_monthly = (
    virus
    .dropna(subset=["conc_toplot"])
    .groupby(["YearMonth", "pathogen"], as_index=False)["conc_toplot"]
    .mean()
)

virus_monthly.head()

cook_daily["YearMonth"] = cook_daily["date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

aqi_monthly = (
    cook_daily
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)

cook_daily_temp["YearMonth"] = cook_daily_temp["date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

temp_monthly = (
    cook_daily_temp
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["temp"]
    .mean()
)

```


```{python}
#merging virus, aqi, and temp data

df_monthly = (
    aqi_monthly
    .merge(temp_monthly, on="YearMonth", how="inner")
    .merge(virus_monthly, on="YearMonth", how="inner")
)

df_monthly["YearMonth"] = pd.to_datetime(df_monthly["YearMonth"])
df_monthly

```

```{python}


# dropdown for pathogen
pathogens = sorted(df_monthly["pathogen"].dropna().unique().tolist())
path_sel = alt.selection_point(
    fields=["pathogen"],
    bind=alt.binding_select(options=pathogens, name="Pathogen: "),
    value=pathogens[0]
)

base = alt.Chart(df_monthly).add_params(path_sel).transform_filter(path_sel).encode(
    x=alt.X("YearMonth:T", title="Year")
)

virus_line = base.mark_line().encode(
    y=alt.Y("conc_toplot:Q", title="Virus concentration"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", "pathogen:N", alt.Tooltip("conc_toplot:Q", format=".2f")]
)

aqi_line = base.mark_line(strokeDash=[6, 4]).encode(
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="AQI"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", alt.Tooltip("AQI:Q", format=".1f")]
)

chart = alt.layer(virus_line, aqi_line).resolve_scale(
    y="independent"
).properties(
    width=850,
    height=380,
    title="Monthly Virus Concentration (selected) vs AQI"
)

chart
```
